title: The Rainy Night Conversation
content: A heavy storm forced Chloe and Ethan to stay inside a small train station café after their evening train was delayed. As rain covered the windows, they began talking about dreams they had never shared with anyone else. The conversation moved from childhood memories to future plans, then to fears and hopes. Hours passed without either of them noticing. When the rain finally stopped and the train arrived, they both realized the unexpected delay had given them something far more valuable than extra travel time. It had allowed them to truly know each other.
